name: a-intelli-yadan
description: AI 通行记录查询与下班提醒推送系统

scripts.start: unset HTTP_PROXY HTTPS_PROXY http_proxy https_proxy ALL_PROXY all_proxy && node index.js
scripts.test: unset HTTP_PROXY HTTPS_PROXY http_proxy https_proxy ALL_PROXY all_proxy && node index.js --test
scripts.test-kimi: unset HTTP_PROXY HTTPS_PROXY http_proxy https_proxy ALL_PROXY all_proxy && node index.js --test --kimi
scripts.login: unset HTTP_PROXY HTTPS_PROXY http_proxy https_proxy ALL_PROXY all_proxy && node -e "import('./src/auth.js').then(m => m.login().then(t => console.log('Token:', t)))"
scripts.query: unset HTTP_PROXY HTTPS_PROXY http_proxy https_proxy ALL_PROXY all_proxy && node index.js --query-only
